GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE

Source: LICENSE.md

Version 3, 29 June 2007

Copyright (C) 2007 Free Software Foundation, Inc. https://fsf.org/

Everyone is permitted to copy and distribute verbatim copies of this license document, but changing it is not allowed.

The full text of the GNU General Public License version 3 is available at https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html.

Code

The R code of the educabr package is licensed under GPL (>= 3).

Data

Datasets shipped with or distributed alongside this package are released under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0), https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/, except where a specific source imposes a stricter license — in which case the restrictions of the original source apply and are noted in inst/dict/vocabularies/sources.yaml.

When using the data, please cite both the educabr package (citation("educabr")) and the original sources of the indicators you use (educabr_cite(source)). The compiled historical series are the result of substantial reconciliation work that goes beyond the original sources; attribution to both is required.

On this page

Developed by Tales Mançano. Code under GPL (>= 3). Data under CC BY 4.0 unless original source restricts it (see inst/dict/vocabularies/sources.yaml).
